source.section: Part 10 - Offence: Weapons & Armament > 2 - Air-to-Ground Weapons > 2.14 - ADM-141A TALD (Tactical AIr Launched Decoy)

steps.voiced: Set Master Arm switch to ARM.

steps.action: Go in SMS (Stores Management System) page
Click on the OSB next to 82P to select a TALD. Pressing OSB next to STEP allows you to step between stations.
steps.voiced: Press the OSB next to 82P to select a TALD, then press STEP to change stations.

steps.action: Press the Weapon Release Button (« RALT+SPACE ») to launch a TALD.
steps.voiced: Press Weapon Release Button to launch.

steps.action: Once launched, the TALD will deploy its wings and glide for as long as it can. Radar emitters should start launching ground-to-air missiles at the decoy once they detect it.
steps.voiced: Wings deploy on release — radar emitters will track and engage the decoy.
